expectations.text: Migrated file no longer imports terraform-plugin-sdk/v2
Implements resource.Resource CRUD (Create, Read, Update, Delete) — Metadata/Schema may be supplied via embedded base type per Linode convention
Cross-attribute constraints translated using framework validators (path.Expressions OR ResourceWithConfigValidators)
MaxItems:1 block expressed as SingleNestedAttribute, SingleNestedBlock, or any list/set with SizeAtMost(1)
Migrated file is syntactically valid Go
